title: Omnigent: The New Meta-Harness for EVERY Coding Agent - Claude Code, Codex, Pi, More
summary: Omnigent is an open-source meta-harness that orchestrates multiple coding models (Claude Code, Codex, Pi) as interchangeable workers. It routes tasks between models, provides human-in-the-loop governance, and maintains sessions across terminal, browser, and mobile devices.
writeup: This video covers Omnigent, an open-source meta-harness that orchestrates multiple coding models, including Claude Code, Codex, and Pi, as interchangeable workers. It routes tasks between those models, adds human-in-the-loop governance, and maintains sessions across terminal, browser, and mobile. The result treats individual coding agents as swappable backends under a single orchestration layer rather than committing to one harness.
